TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakaliman == kabaluduhan lin-ba bay-siy-bing, nacaay kalalucek kya lin-pa-si-pau,kya tahekal kinaimelang, lin-pa-si-pau sa sapaculi tu cacanan, a imelang namayka kulus, alin-pa-ciy masanga'. . nilaculan u sakakatu ninaimelang namakayni i kaliyuhan micalipuay kalaheci, sisa mabuwah mulalad, tayda i kulus i tapiingan ulat nu idang, lin-pa-ciy nu udip ibesi, i bala' micamelay i idang. sakalingatu ninaimelang mahida bahal lin-pa-sang, pay-siy-ciw cikata taneng, sisa mulahad akuti', alahican sa lin-pa-siang ataybesi iyadahay, u dumasa mibusing iulaulatan anu caay sa sipakayni i punu' ulades. .
S.PHON: == kakar~…ĺiman == kabar~…ĺuduńßan r~…ĺin-ba baj-sij-biŇč, na ¶aaj kar~…ĺar~…ĺu ¶…ôk kja r~…ĺin-pa-si-pau,kja tańß…ôkar~…ĺ kinaim…ôr~…ĺaŇč, r~…ĺin-pa-si-pau sa sapa ¶ur~…ĺi tu ¶a ¶anan, a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč namajka kur~…ĺus, ar~…ĺin-pa- ¶ij masaŇča Ē~ °. . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan u sakakatu ninaim…ôr~…ĺaŇč namakajni i kar~…ĺijuńßan mi ¶ar~…ĺipuaj kar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, sisa mabuwańß mur~…ĺar~…ĺad, tajda i kur~…ĺus i tapiiŇčan ur~…ĺat nu idaŇč, r~…ĺin-pa- ¶ij nu udip ib…ôsi, i bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° mi ¶am…ôr~…ĺaj i idaŇč. sakar~…ĺiŇčatu ninaim…ôr~…ĺaŇč mańßida bańßar~…ĺ r~…ĺin-pa-saŇč, paj-sij- ¶iw ¶ikata tan…ôŇč, sisa mur~…ĺańßad akuti Ē~ °, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an sa r~…ĺin-pa-siaŇč atajb…ôsi ijadańßaj, u dumasa mibusiŇč iur~…ĺaur~…ĺatan anu ¶aaj sa sipakajni i punu Ē~ ° ur~…ĺad…ôs. .
S.FORM: == kakaliman == kabaluduhan lin-ba bay-siy-bing, nacaay kalalucek kya lin-pa-si-pau,kya tahekal kinaimelang, lin-pa-si-pau sa sapaculi tu cacanan, a imelang namayka kulus, alin-pa-ciy masanga'. . nilaculan u sakakatu ninaimelang namakayni i kaliyuhan micalipuay kalaheci, sisa mabuwah mulalad, tayda i kulus i tapiingan ulat nu idang, lin-pa-ciy nu udip ibesi, i bala' micamelay i idang. sakalingatu ninaimelang mahida bahal lin-pa-sang, pay-siy-ciw cikata taneng, sisa mulahad akuti', alahican sa lin-pa-siang ataybesi iyadahay, u dumasa mibusing iulaulatan anu caay sa sipakayni i punu' ulades. .
S.PHON: == kakar~…ĺiman == kabar~…ĺuduńßan r~…ĺin-ba baj-sij-biŇč, na ¶aaj kar~…ĺar~…ĺu ¶…ôk kja r~…ĺin-pa-si-pau,kja tańß…ôkar~…ĺ kinaim…ôr~…ĺaŇč, r~…ĺin-pa-si-pau sa sapa ¶ur~…ĺi tu ¶a ¶anan, a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč namajka kur~…ĺus, ar~…ĺin-pa- ¶ij masaŇča Ē~ °. . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan u sakakatu ninaim…ôr~…ĺaŇč namakajni i kar~…ĺijuńßan mi ¶ar~…ĺipuaj kar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, sisa mabuwańß mur~…ĺar~…ĺad, tajda i kur~…ĺus i tapiiŇčan ur~…ĺat nu idaŇč, r~…ĺin-pa- ¶ij nu udip ib…ôsi, i bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° mi ¶am…ôr~…ĺaj i idaŇč. sakar~…ĺiŇčatu ninaim…ôr~…ĺaŇč mańßida bańßar~…ĺ r~…ĺin-pa-saŇč, paj-sij- ¶iw ¶ikata tan…ôŇč, sisa mur~…ĺańßad akuti Ē~ °, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an sa r~…ĺin-pa-siaŇč atajb…ôsi ijadańßaj, u dumasa mibusiŇč iur~…ĺaur~…ĺatan anu ¶aaj sa sipakajni i punu Ē~ ° ur~…ĺad…ôs. .
